title: Pull Requests Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub PR concepts.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what is a 'Pull Request' used for?
options: To formally propose and review code changes before they are merged into a main branch

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a pull-request-based workflow?
options: Proposing changes and getting review and feedback from project maintainers
Recording a commit directly to the main branch
Its only possible for SQL repositories
